title: Exam Overview

detail.title: Exam Overview
detail.short_info: WBJEEB Exam Schedule 2026 is out! Download the official PDF from wbjeeb.nic.in, check key dates, exam timetable, and steps to prepare. Full details on registration, eligibility, and FAQs for WBJEE 2026.

content.text: The West Bengal Joint Entrance Examinations Board (WBJEEB) manages entrance exams like WBJEE for B.Tech, B.Pharm, and B.Arch admissions in West Bengal. The 2026 schedule covers registration, exams, results, and counselling across multiple events.​

This PDF provides a centralized timetable, helping candidates plan for competitive exams based on Class 11-12 syllabus. Key phases align with prior years, starting from application forms to seat allotment.​
Access wbjeeb.nic.in and navigate to "Notices" or "Downloads." Use the direct link: Click Here for instant download—no login needed.​
Save or print the PDF for quick reference. Regularly check the site for updates like information bulletins or corrections.​
Follow these steps:

items: Click the March 13 PDF titled "WBJEEB Exam Schedule 2026."

content.text: The schedule outlines major milestones for WBJEE 2026 and related exams. Here's a breakdown based on the official release and trends.

Candidates must have passed Class 12 with Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics, securing at least 45% aggregate (40% for reserved categories). Minimum age is 17 years by December 31, 2026—no upper limit for WBJEE.
West Bengal domicile offers reservation benefits, but all-India candidates can apply. Full details appear in the upcoming WBJEE 2026 bulletin on the official site.​
Focus on NCERT Class 11-12 for Physics (Laws of Motion, Optics), Chemistry (Organic Reactions), and Mathematics (Calculus, Vectors). Practice with past papers emphasizing speed for OMR format.
WBJEE features Paper 1 (Maths: 100 marks, 2 hours) and Paper 2 (Physics+Chemistry: 100 marks, 2 hours), with negative marking on select questions. Create a study plan matching the May exam date.

items: WBJEEB Official Site: Click Here– Notices and portals.
WBJEE Page: Click Here – Exam-specific updates.
